figures.caption: Table 1. Comparative results on Maximum Independent Set (MIS). The best results are bolded and the second-best ones are underlined, excluding OR solvers. The gap is computed against the result of KaMIS (Großmann et al., 2023) and CAM (on ER-[9000–11000]).

Table 2. Comparative results on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). The best results are bolded and the second-best ones are underlined, excluding OR solvers. The gap is computed against the result of LKH-3 (Helsgaun, 2017).
